audience: Engaged client, family investment committee, or sophisticated principal
conversation_goal: Explain performance, exposures, themes, and risk without turning the meeting into advisor internal diligence.
core_user_question: How did policy, managers, exposures, themes, and scenarios explain the portfolio?

ordered_steps.caveat: Local synthetic product-review report; not production reporting.
ordered_steps.visible_question_answered: What portfolio view are we using?
ordered_steps.why_included: Anchors the committee in portfolio representation before deeper review.

ordered_steps.caveat: Local synthetic product-review report; not production reporting.
ordered_steps.visible_question_answered: Did the portfolio follow the policy allocation?
ordered_steps.why_included: Shows whether actual allocation lines up with the policy frame.

ordered_steps.caveat: Local synthetic product-review report; not production reporting.
ordered_steps.visible_question_answered: Which advisor policy decisions drove return?
ordered_steps.why_included: Explains advisor-level policy effects before manager implementation.

ordered_steps.caveat: Local synthetic product-review report; not production reporting.
ordered_steps.visible_question_answered: How did managers do versus mandate benchmarks?
ordered_steps.why_included: Shows whether managers added value versus their own mandates.

ordered_steps.caveat: Local synthetic product-review report; not production reporting.
ordered_steps.visible_question_answered: How exposed is the portfolio to AI Adoption?
ordered_steps.why_included: Shows the portfolio through the AI Adoption lens.

ordered_steps.caveat: Local synthetic product-review report; not production reporting.
ordered_steps.visible_question_answered: How exposed is the portfolio to Energy Security?
ordered_steps.why_included: Shows the portfolio through the Energy Security lens.

ordered_steps.caveat: Local synthetic product-review report; not production reporting.
ordered_steps.display_title: Manager by Lens Exposure - AI Adoption
ordered_steps.visible_question_answered: Which managers express the AI lens?
ordered_steps.why_included: Adds manager context for the selected lens without becoming a full drilldown.

ordered_steps.caveat: Local synthetic product-review report; not production reporting.
ordered_steps.visible_question_answered: What could hurt the portfolio now?

ordered_steps.caveat: Local synthetic product-review report; not production reporting.
ordered_steps.visible_question_answered: Which internal manager drivers explain implementation?
ordered_steps.why_included: Optional dense manager implementation matrix for committee follow-up.

what_this_workflow_proves: Arangur can combine policy attribution, manager mandate attribution, lens exposure, and scenario risk while keeping detail optional.
why_this_workflow_exists: Investment committees need performance, exposure, and risk in one ordered review without every internal diagnostic.
